name: ASCII Render Post
description: Renders any TOP as a grid of ASCII glyphs, mirroring create_ascii_render: the source is downsampled to one texel per character cell, a textTOP bakes a glyph atlas of the charset, and a GLSL TOP looks up each cell's luminance to pick a glyph from the atlas. Uses a synthetic animated noiseTOP source so it previews offline. Uniforms expose the color mode, charset length, foreground/background colors and a wet/dry mix. Fills the ascii/dither/halftone post gap. Offline-validated against RecipeSchema; UNVERIFIED pending live cook-check (glyph-atlas UV math benefits from a live look).

nodes.name: source
nodes.comment: Synthetic source — swap for any TOP (selectTOP to an existing one, moviefileinTOP, etc).

nodes.name: cells
nodes.comment: Downsample to one texel per character cell (here 160x90 cells for a 1280x720 / cell_size 8 grid).

nodes.name: atlas
nodes.comment: Glyph atlas: the charset laid out left-to-right, white glyphs on transparent (10 chars x cell_size 8 = 80 wide).

nodes.name: ascii_glsl
nodes.comment: Per-fragment: read the cell luma, map to a glyph index, sample the atlas at that slot.

glsl_uniforms.name: uColorMode
glsl_uniforms.label: Color Mode
glsl_uniforms.description: 0 = fixed fg/bg, 1 = source color on bg, 2 = luma-shaded fg on bg.

glsl_uniforms.name: uCharsetLen
glsl_uniforms.label: Charset Length
glsl_uniforms.description: Number of glyphs in the atlas (matches the atlas text length).

glsl_uniforms.name: uMix
glsl_uniforms.label: Mix
glsl_uniforms.description: Wet/dry between the original cell grid and the ASCII result.

glsl_uniforms.name: uCellSize
glsl_uniforms.label: Cell Size
glsl_uniforms.description: Pixels per character cell; must match the downsample/atlas geometry.

preview_description: A flowing noise field rendered as green terminal ASCII art on near-black — denser glyphs (#, @) where the image is bright, sparse dots where it is dark.
